commands.review_summary:
The PR refreshes managed QMD `index.yml` during update repair, quotes generated collection values, preserves forced remove/add rebuilding, adds regression tests, and removes one redundant non-null assertion.

PR surface: Source +37, Tests +119. Total +156 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main retries QMD null-byte and duplicate-document update failures through forced collection rebuilds but does not refresh the QMD index config first. I did not run a live QMD repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair is needed; the previous changelog blocker is gone and the remaining action is ordinary maintainer review/merge judgment.

target.title: fix(memory-core): safely refresh qmd index during collection repair
target.body:
## Summary
- Repair source PR #68590 on its contributor branch.
- Write QMD index.yml with safely quoted collection name, path, and pattern values.
- Preserve the existing forced remove/add rebuild in rebuildManagedCollectionsForRepair so duplicate-document and null-byte repair paths are not no-ops.
- Add regression coverage for quoted YAML values and the still-listed collection repair case.

Source PR credit: Thanks @imadal1n for the original index rewrite direction in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/68590.

Validation: pnpm -s vitest run extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-manager.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-compat.test.ts; pnpm check:changed.

Clownfish 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: ghcrawl-156633-autonomous-smoke
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/68590
- Credit: Credit @imadal1n for source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/68590 and the QMD index rewrite direction.; Keep contributor attribution on the repaired branch; do not replace the PR unless the branch becomes unsafe or uneditable.
- Validation: pnpm -s vitest run extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-manager.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-compat.test.ts; pnpm check:changed
- Repair fallback: source PR #68590 is a fork branch requiring rebase; use replacement branch because GitHub App pushes to contributor forks can be rejected when rebased upstream history includes workflow files

fish notes: model gpt-5.5, reasoning xhigh; reviewed against 87ef72dd297c.
